title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at MagicBricks South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks South Asia Partners family as a Frontend Developer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
